IDOT Sidecar Utility Coordination · Live Assistant

Idle: click Start Listening
Not official minutes. AI coaching is suggestion only. Evidence-based; draft, not a record of decision.
Live Coaching
Coaching tips appear here once the meeting is running and enough has been said. They are prompts for the coordinator, not determinations.
0 words
Live transcript will appear here.
Click "Start Listening" to transcribe in the browser (Chrome or Edge), or load a sample coordination meeting to see the full pipeline: transcript, coaching, extraction and exports.

Settings

Personal Access Token for a GitHub account with Copilot enabled. Create one at github.com/settings/tokens: no special scopes required. Stored only in this browser's local storage; never sent anywhere but GitHub's API.
From your IT department's one-time Entra app registration (single-page application platform, redirect URI = this page's URL, delegated Copilot Chat API permissions with admin consent). Requires a Microsoft 365 Copilot license on your account.
Create a key at console.anthropic.com. Stored only in this browser's local storage; sent only to Anthropic's API. Works even when this file is opened directly from disk.
Any OpenAI-compatible endpoint: NVIDIA NIM hosted (https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1 + free nvapi- key), a self-hosted NIM container, Ollama, LiteLLM, vLLM, LM Studio. A trailing /v1 is handled either way. The server must allow CORS from this page's origin. With a local server, transcript text never leaves your machine.
Autocompletes from the server's /v1/models list when the server is reachable.
